title: Is it possible to edit the text in an Update through the API?
excerpt: I am successfully using the monday API to load Updates to specific items in monday.com from MS/Excel.  However, I can’t work out how to edit the text in an existing Update.  I am capturing the Update ID when I create it …

posts.author: soffed (Darren Soffe)
posts.cookedHtml: I am successfully using the monday API to load Updates to specific items in monday.com from MS/Excel. However, I can’t work out how to edit the text in an existing Update. I am capturing the Update ID when I create it in my spreadsheet but I can’t see how to use this to edit the text. Any ideas?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
See Updates

There is no edit function (only create and delete). You can try to delete and add the revised one (but it will get a new date).

posts.author: soffed (Darren Soffe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bas. That’s what I’d guessed but I wanted to be sure.
Thanks for getting back to me so quickly.
Thx. D

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @basdebruin for the help here!

posts.author: Anant (Anant KC)
posts.cookedHtml: When will the edit update feature arrive?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Only monday.com employees can answer that (I’m not )

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Anant,

We do not have an ETA for such a feature at the moment.

Cheers,
Matias
